summary: Iteration 40: ZATCA Settings Section Testing - All 18 backend tests passed (100%), All UI elements verified working. ZATCA tab in Settings allows users to configure CSID credentials for Phase 2 compliance.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settings/zatca returns 200
Backend: GET /api/settings/zatca returns correct structure (enabled, environment, otp, csid, auto_submit, invoice_counter, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/settings/zatca returns correct default types
Backend: POST /api/settings/zatca returns 200 with success message
Backend: POST /api/settings/zatca persists data correctly
Backend: GET /api/settings/zatca masks sensitive fields (csid_secret, production_secret, private_key)
Backend: POST /api/settings/zatca preserves masked secrets when re-saving
Backend: POST /api/settings/zatca/test handles no settings gracefully
Backend: POST /api/settings/zatca/test fails when ZATCA disabled
Backend: POST /api/settings/zatca/test fails when no CSID
Backend: POST /api/settings/zatca/test validates Base64 format
Backend: POST /api/settings/zatca/test succeeds for valid sandbox credentials
Backend: POST /api/settings/zatca/test succeeds for valid production credentials
Backend: GET /api/settings/zatca/status returns 200
Backend: GET /api/settings/zatca/status returns correct structure (enabled, environment, vat_enabled, vat_number, csid_configured, auto_submit, invoice_counter, statistics)
Backend: GET /api/settings/zatca/status reflects current settings
Backend: GET /api/settings/zatca/status statistics have correct types (int)
Frontend: Settings page has ZATCA tab
Frontend: ZATCA tab shows Phase 2 Enable toggle (data-testid=zatca-phase2-toggle)
Frontend: ZATCA tab shows Environment selection (Sandbox/Production buttons)
Frontend: ZATCA tab shows CSID Credentials section with Sandbox fields (data-testid=zatca-csid-sandbox, zatca-secret-sandbox)
Frontend: ZATCA tab shows CSID Credentials section with Production fields (data-testid=zatca-csid-production, zatca-secret-production)
Frontend: ZATCA tab shows Invoice Settings (Auto-submit toggle, Invoice Counter ICV, OTP field)
Frontend: ZATCA tab shows Save ZATCA Settings button (data-testid=save-zatca-btn)
Frontend: ZATCA tab shows Test Connection button (data-testid=test-zatca-btn)
Frontend: ZATCA tab shows Open ZATCA Portal link (fatoora.zatca.gov.sa)
Frontend: ZATCA tab shows Registration Steps guide (6 steps)
Frontend: Advanced section expands with Certificate and Private Key fields
Frontend: Save button saves settings with success toast
Frontend: Test Connection validates credentials with feedback toast
critical_code_review_comments: ZATCA Settings backend (settings.py): Properly masks sensitive fields (csid_secret, production_secret, private_key) when retrieving settings
ZATCA Settings backend: Preserves existing secrets when masked values (••••••••) are sent back
ZATCA Settings backend: Test connection validates Base64 encoding of CSID
ZATCA Settings backend: Status endpoint provides invoice statistics (total, zatca_ready, submitted)
ZATCA Settings frontend (SettingsPage.jsx): Clean UI with collapsible Advanced section for certificate/private key
ZATCA Settings frontend: Environment-aware credential display (shows sandbox or production fields based on selection)
ZATCA Settings frontend: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
ZATCA Settings frontend: Includes helpful Registration Steps guide with 6 steps

mocked_apis.ZATCA API connection test: Validates credential format only (Base64 encoding), actual ZATCA API call requires ZATCA SDK integration

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 tested ZATCA Settings section in Settings. APIs: GET /api/settings/zatca returns configuration with masked secrets, POST /api/settings/zatca saves configuration (preserves masked secrets), POST /api/settings/zatca/test validates credentials (Base64 format check, MOCKED actual ZATCA API), GET /api/settings/zatca/status returns status summary with invoice statistics. UI: ZATCA tab with Phase 2 toggle, Environment selection (Sandbox/Production), CSID credentials (sandbox and production), Invoice Settings (auto-submit, ICV counter, OTP), action buttons (Save, Test Connection, Open Portal), Registration Steps guide, Advanced section with Certificate and Private Key fields.
